title: Isolation of total RNA from Synechocystis (PGTX method)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ldth","text":"Isolation of 40-200 µg of total RNA from Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803. Can be used for standard applications such as Northern Blot and qPCR.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":41,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fpb0p","text":"Keep RNA cold and in an RNase-free environment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6mqsi","text":"PGTX solution (100 mL): 39.6 g phenol, 6.9 mL glycerol, 0.1 g hydroxyquinoline, 0.58 g EDTA, 0.8 g NaOAc, 9.5 g guanidine thiocyanate, 4.6 g guanidine hydrochloride","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"epq77","text":"Hazardous materials: PGTX, Chloroform","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f2vsr","text":"Wear safety gear and gloves at all times.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow cyanobacteria to an OD 750 of ~1. Fill a 50 mL tube with ice. Add culture until full (approx. 25 mL) Centrifuge tube 5 min at maximum speed. 00:05:00
Discard supernatant. Resuspend cyanobacterial pellet in the remaining water (~1mL) Transfer to a fresh 2 mL tube. Spin down 1 min at maximum speed. 00:01:00

Resuspend pellet in 1 mL PGTX solution. Flash freeze and store at -80˚C for later extraction, or proceed with the next step. PGTX Contributed by users PGTX contains phenol; wear safety gear and gloves
Heat samples at 95˚C in a shaking heat block. Vortex samples from time to time to ensure complete lysis. 00:05:00
Place samples on ice for 5 min. 00:05:00
Add 700 µL Chloroform/IAA. Mix well. Incubate at RT for 10 min, vortexing from time to time. 00:10:00 Wear safety gear
Centrifuge samples at maximum speed for 10 min to separate phases. Transfer aqueous phase to a fresh tube. 00:10:00
Add 1 vol Chloroform/IAA. Mix well by vortexing. Centrifuge 10 min at maximum speed. Transfer aqueous phase to a fresh tube. 00:10:00
Add 3 vol. of 100 % EtOH + NaOAc 10:1 to the sample. Mix well. Precipitate 1 h at -80˚C or over night at -20˚C.
Centrifuge precipitated sample at 4˚C and maximum speed for at least 30 min. Remove supernatant, making sure not to disrupt the RNA pellet. 00:30:00
Wash pellet with 70% EtOH. Centrifuge for 15 min, 4˚C at maximum speed. Completely remove supernatant. Dry at RT for ~5 min. Do not overdry! Resuspend pellet in 40 µL pure, RNase-free water.
creator: Anna Behle
